name: 명숙 (Myeong-suk)
visual_description: Myeong-suk is an older Korean woman, likely in her 60s. She has a stern face etched with years of hardship and resolve. Her hair is pulled back in a tight bun, streaked with gray. She wears traditional Korean clothing hanbok suitable for someone of her age and status within the family, perhaps a muted earth tone. Her eyes are sharp and calculating, reflecting her intelligence and determination. She has a slight build but carries herself with dignity and strength.
consistency_prompt: Stern Korean woman in her 60s, traditional hanbok, gray hair in a bun, determined face.
